corpora.label: arXiv papers
corpora.description: Scientific papers from arXiv (open-licensed subset). Try pasting an abstract, or load one of the examples.

corpora.label: English Wikipedia
corpora.description: English Wikipedia articles. Try pasting a sentence from an article, or load one of the examples.
corpora.dataset_note: This is the full upstream dataset (a superset) — only a subset of its articles is indexed here. Use the search box below to see exactly what's included.

corpora.label: HPLT web crawl
corpora.description: A large multilingual web-crawl corpus (HPLT). Examples link to the original page and a web.archive.org snapshot, as many originals have since changed or gone offline.
